macro_markets.query: What are the most important macroeconomic and stock market news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major index movements, Fed/central bank news, and significant company earnings or announcements.

crypto_news.query: What are the most significant cryptocurrency and blockchain news from the past 24 hours? Include major price movements, regulatory news, and notable project developments.

items.title: Ripple Prime Secures $200M Debt Facility from Neuberger Berman
items.summary: Ripple announced a $200 million debt facility partnership with Neuberger Specialty Finance to expand its multi-asset prime brokerage platform amid rising institutional demand. The deal supports financing for institutional clients using XRP and other assets.

items.title: Crypto.com Receives UAE Stored Value Facilities License
items.summary: Crypto.com has been granted a UAE SVF license, enabling virtual asset payments for government services and expanding its regulatory footprint in the region.

items.title: Ethereum Price Drops to $2,290 Amid Market Correction
items.summary: Ethereum traded at $2,290.85 at 9:15 a.m. ET on May 12, down $40 from yesterday and $205 from a year ago, reflecting ongoing volatility and profit-taking pressures.

items.title: Monero Hits New All-Time High Despite Regulatory Delistings
items.summary: Monero (XMR) reached a price high not seen in eight years in January 2026, with on-chain transaction volume up 30-35% amid EU regulatory pressures forcing 73 exchanges to delist it, boosting non-custodial ecosystem growth.

items.title: Toncoin Leads $187M Token Unlock Wave This Month
items.summary: Toncoin (TON) tops the list with $86.77 million in tokens unlocking this month, representing nearly half of the $187.65 million total from seven major projects entering circulation.

items.title: Coinbase Reports Q1 Results with Record Trading Volume Market Share
items.summary: Coinbase achieved an all-time high crypto trading volume market share of 8.6% in Q1, driven by product innovation across exchange, stablecoins, payments, and onchain adoption.

items.title: Corpay Partners with BVNK for Stablecoin Wallets
items.summary: Corpay partnered with BVNK to integrate stablecoin wallets, allowing global customers to send, receive, store, and convert stablecoins alongside fiat balances.

ai_news.query: What are the most important artificial intelligence and machine learning news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include new model releases, company announcements, research breakthroughs, and industry trends.

gaming.query: What are the most notable video game and gaming industry news from the past 24 hours? Include game releases, announcements, esports, and industry developments.

items.title: Nintendo Confirms More Unannounced Switch 2 Games for 2026 and Valve Prepares Steam Machine Launch
items.summary: During an investor Q&A, Nintendo revealed additional unannounced games planned for 2026, while Valve is reportedly setting up an order reservation system for the Steam Machine.

items.title: Crimson Desert Announces DLC Content and Expansions
items.summary: Nexon revealed plans to expand Crimson Desert with DLC and other content to broaden the game's scope.

items.title: Helldivers 2 Players Upset Over New Update Decision in Galactic War
items.summary: A recent update in Helldivers 2's ongoing galactic civilizations war has sparked backlash among players.

items.title: Ken Levine Reflects on BioShock, Judas, and 30 Years of Game Design Evolution
items.summary: In an IGN interview, Ken Levine discusses his career from Looking Glass Studios to Ghost Story Games, covering iconic titles like BioShock and the upcoming Judas.

tech_news.query: What are the most important technology news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major product launches, company news, and significant tech industry developments. Exclude AI-specific news.

items.title: Sony Launches New Wearable Air Conditioner That Runs Even Cooler
items.summary: Sony has introduced a new wearable air conditioner designed to provide enhanced cooling performance.

items.title: Googlebooks Announced as Android-Based Evolution of Chromebooks
items.summary: Google teased its new Googlebooks laptop lineup, evolving Chromebooks into an Android-based platform.

items.title: Android 17 Released with Improved iOS File Sharing and Forced Breaks for Addictive Apps
items.summary: The latest Android 17 update includes better file sharing compatibility with iOS and features to enforce breaks from addictive applications, along with new 3D Emoji.

items.title: Rivian Rolls Out AI-Powered Voice Assistant to All Gen 1, Gen 2 Vehicles and Upcoming R2
items.summary: Rivian's new voice assistant is being deployed across its vehicle lineup, enhancing in-car interactions.

items.title: Forza Horizon 6 Leaks a Week Ahead of Launch via Unencrypted Steam Files
items.summary: Pirates downloaded and shared unencrypted files from Steam, leaking details of Forza Horizon 6 just before its official release.

items.title: iOS Begins Rolling Out End-to-End Encrypted RCS Messaging in Beta with Lock Icon on Android
items.summary: Apple is starting beta rollout of end-to-end encrypted RCS messaging for iOS, visible with a new lock icon in Android chats.

items.title: Percona Refocuses on Fast-Impact Database Services for AI Readiness and Talent Shortages
items.summary: Percona is offering structured database services to boost enterprise performance and prepare open-source platforms amid talent shortages.

items.title: Amazon Expands Alexa+ to the Web Amid Intensifying AI Competition
items.summary: Amazon is launching Alexa+ on the web to extend its assistant beyond devices, targeting agentic workflows against rivals.

items.title: Gartner Advises Organizations to Block AI Browsers Due to Security Risks
items.summary: Gartner warns that AI-powered browsers pose data exposure and security threats, recommending avoidance for enterprises.

items.title: Spectral Compute's Compiler Tech Threatens Nvidia's $5 Trillion Dominance via CUDA Alternatives
items.summary: New compiler technology from Spectral could enable broader hardware options, challenging Nvidia's CUDA lock-in in the AI market.

items.title: Google and Qualcomm Push Android PCs as Mainstream Challenge to Microsoft and Apple
items.summary: The Android PC initiative aims to scale Android to desktops, pursuing Google's vision of unified computing.

items.title: Quantum Motion Deploys First Full-Stack Silicon Quantum Computer Using Standard Chip Fabrication
items.summary: This milestone uses conventional silicon processes, potentially accelerating scalable quantum computing development.

items.title: Seven Smart Rings Developed to Translate Sign Language into Instant Text
items.summary: A South Korean startup's smart rings convert hand movements into text, aiming to overcome sign language barriers.

items.title: Carnegie Mellon Team Invents Tiny Thermal Barcode for Pixel-Precise Heat Manipulation
items.summary: The technology digitizes thermal radiation like pixels, published in Science Advances with broad potential applications.

items.title: Key Discovery Boosts EV Driving Range and Battery Lifespan Simultaneously
items.summary: Researchers found a crucial clue to improve both electric vehicle range and battery durability.
